title: Structura
description: A modpack that supercharges creativity and construction.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f409cebbfb10fedd6e1cfe72d925c885152480a.png)

**Structura** is a modpack designed for builders and map makers, enhancing creativity with 
powerful tools like Litematica, BuildPaste, and Axiom. Optimize performance with Sodium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix while improving visuals with Iris Shaders, Continuity, and LambDynamicLights. Whether you're constructing massive structures or crafting immersive worlds, *Structura* gives you the tools to build smarter, faster, and more beautifully than ever. 


<details>
<summary>Mods in this pack</summary>

- Axiom  
- BadOptimizations  
- BetterF3  
- BuildPaste - Instant Structures  
- Cloth Config API  
- Collective  
- Continuity  
- Dynamic FPS  
- [EMF] Entity Model Features  
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features  
- Enhanced Block Entities  
- Entity Culling  
- Fabric API  
- Fabric Language Kotlin  
- Fabrishot  
- FerriteCore  
- Freecam  
- Full Brightness Toggle  
- ImmediatelyFast  
- Iris Shaders  
- LambDynamicLights  
- Lithium  
- Litematica  
- MaLiLib  
- Mod Menu  
- ModernFix  
- More Culling  
- Noisium  
- Not Enough Crashes  
- ReplayMod  
- Sodium  
- Sodium Extra  
- Text Placeholder API  
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)  
- Zoomify  
- Tree Harvester

</details>
